category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/geelen/mcp-remote documents remote MCP server and OAuth-related usage.
source_facts.description says this is a remote proxy for Model Context Protocol with OAuth support.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mcp-remote: https://github.com/geelen/mcp-remote
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README contains setup guidance, remote MCP resources, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README references building remote MCP servers and OAuth-compatible server resources.
source_facts.description identifies remote proxy and OAuth support.
